product: ARCS WIFO (ARCS Wide + ARCS Focus). Related legacy variants: original ARCS, ARCS II.

electroacoustic.max_spl_note: Per-variant peak SPL at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4, [ARCS_WIFO] preset: ARCS FOCUS 139 dB, ARCS WIDE 137 dB (135 dB on the earlier datasheet revision).
electroacoustic.directivity: Constant curvature WST line source. Coverage (-6 dB): ARCS WIDE 90 deg x 30 deg (H x V), ARCS FOCUS 90 deg x 15 deg (H x V). Array coverage scales with element count (N x 30 deg for WIDE, N x 15 deg for FOCUS).
electroacoustic.components: 2-way passive: LF 1 x 12" weather-resistant bass-reflex; HF 1 x 3" diaphragm compression driver on a DOSC waveguide. RMS power handling 450 W.

operating_modes: passive 2-way (single amplifier channel drives one enclosure, LF and HF crossed over by the internal passive network)
amplification.per_amplifier_note: App value: 2 enclosures per LA4 (one ARCS per output channel; an LA4/LA4X drives up to 4 ARCS total). On LA8/LA12X up to two ARCS can be paralleled per channel (8 ohm single, 4 ohm pair), so up to 8 enclosures per LA8.
amplification.preset_note: ARCS_WIFO is the reference medium-throw preset and drives both WIDE and FOCUS; ARCS_WIFO_FI is the short-throw (front-fill) variant. SB18_60 / SB18_60_C are subwoofer presets (cardioid) for the SB18m LF extension.

connection.input_connector: 1x 4-point speakON (NL4) IN + 1x 4-point speakON (NL4) LINK. Internal pinout: 1+/1- feed the transducer, 2+/2- not used.
connection.breakouts: SP-Y1 breakout (4-point speakON to 2x 2-point speakON, supplied with CC4FP adapter) splits one channel pair to two enclosures; DOSUB-LA8 8-point PA-COM breakout to 4x 2-point speakON for LA8 fan-out. Compatible loudspeaker cables: SP.7/SP5/SP10/SP25 (4-point speakON) and DO.7/DO10/DO25 (PA-COM).

physical.weight_note: ARCS FOCUS 38 kg / 84 lb net; ARCS WIDE 36 kg / 79 lb net. Both share the same cabinet envelope.
physical.dimensions_mm: 365/140 (W top/bottom taper) x 759 (H) x 444 (D) mm; 14.4/5.5 x 29.9 x 17.5 in
physical.cabinet: Baltic birch plywood; steel grill front with anti-corrosion coating and Airnet acoustically neutral fabric. Finish: Dark Grey brown (Pantone 426C), Pure White (RAL 9010), or custom RAL on order. Rigging components in high-strength steel with anti-corrosion coating.

modes: ground-stacked on ground or on SB18m subwoofer (WIFOTILT)
deployment.max_per_flown_array: WIFOBUMP: 8 ARCS (max); WIFOLIFTBAR: 5 safe / 6 WIDE or 5 FOCUS max; WIFOLIFT: 4 ARCS per bar. WIFOBUMP also flies up to 4 SB18m. Max 4 ARCS under SB18m in hybrid vertical configs.
deployment.inter_element_angles: Constant curvature: 30 deg per WIDE element, 15 deg per FOCUS element in the coupling plane. WIFOTILT/tilt holes set the array site angle; refer to SOUNDVISION and the rigging manual tilt charts.
rigging_accessories: WIFORIG (coupling bars with LOCKTAB, 2 supplied per enclosure)
WIFOBUMP (vertical flying frame, 2x bow shackle WLL 1 t)
WIFOTILT (stack-and-tilt up to 4 ARCS on SB18m)

usage: Constant-curvature WST line source for medium-throw work: FOH L/R, central clusters, side-fill monitors, distributed delays and complementary fills, in both touring and fixed installs.

Choose ARCS WIDE (30 deg horizontal) to blanket a wide audience with few boxes, or ARCS FOCUS (15 deg horizontal) when you need more SPL and reach over a tighter coverage; the two can be mixed in a WIFO hybrid array for awkward room geometry.

Each box is a passive 2-way needing one amp channel; on an LA4/LA4X budget one ARCS per output (the app models 2 per LA4), while an LA8 can parallel two boxes per channel for up to 8 enclosures total.
Both variants run off the same ARCS_WIFO preset (use ARCS_WIFO_FI for short-throw front-fills), so a single drive setting covers a mixed WIDE/FOCUS rig.
Pair with SB18m subwoofers (down to 32 Hz) for full-range output, using the SB18_60 preset or SB18_60_C for cardioid LF; in flown hybrid columns keep no more than four ARCS hung beneath the subs.

Always model the array in SOUNDVISION before rigging to confirm mechanical safety factors and pick tilt-hole settings; deploy with WIFORIG bars plus WIFOBUMP (vertical) or WIFOLIFT/WIFOLIFTBAR (horizontal), or ground-stack on SB18m with WIFOTILT.
source_manual: ARCS Wide/Focus System User Manual (EN) v4.0; ARCS Wide/Focus System Rigging Manual (EN) v9.0; ARCS WIDE datasheet (EN)
